data.body: Okay! I think you might misunderstand what inflation is. Inflation is the measure of aggregate price rises. So if all prices go up 20%, then inflation is 20%. There wouldn't be a separate 25% inflation to add. You dont add price increases to some separate inflation. Inflation is the price growth.
